CustomField.description: JSON array of per-row patches (Partial<GanttTask> with required id) for live gantt updates. Carries the smallest patch that captures each write so concurrent inline edits on other clients don't get clobbered. Populated when ChangeTypeTxt__c is task_upsert.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: JSON array of per-row task patches. Each patch must include an id; absent keys are preserved by the gantt reducer.
CustomField.label: Task Patches JSON
